positive: A cute, sticker-style illustration of a steaming cup of coffee that has magically transformed into a friendly, smiling cloud face. The steam should form the facial features. Simple, cartoonish, cheerful, clean vector art, perfect for merchandise. Bright and inviting colors.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, complex background, hyperdetailed, watercolor
